A king, who does not honour an astrologer who is thoroughly
proficient in the science with all its parts and minute subdivisions
and who is wedded to Horoscopy and Astronomy, will surely come
to grief.
[In this and the following fourteen verses the metre employ-
ed is the ^loka.]

Even ascetics who have resorted to forests and who are free
from attachment (i.e. the sense of •mine*) and family ties, consult
an expert astrologer (who can know people's fate through the
movements of planets).
[It is extremely difficult even for sages and hermits to attain
self-realization.
